def negative_tuple_return_with_three_or_more_positional_fields_in_public_api():
    rule_id = "tuple_return_with_three_or_more_positional_fields_in_public_api"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag public APIs that return positional tuples too wide to be self-documenting."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
